creator: gunther.stengl@gmail.com
text:
I did the following testing:

preparation
--------------
- uninstall p5-XML-Parser
- uninstall intltool (not needed)
- patch misc/shared-mime-info with your patch-file

compilation
---------------
portmaster misc/shared-mime-info
(NLM support was marked "active" so I did not test that change)

result
------
===>>> Creating a package for new version shared-mime-info-1.0_3
        ===>>> Package saved to /usr/ports/packages/All

===>>> The following actions were performed:
        Installation of textproc/p5-XML-Parser (p5-XML-Parser-2.41)
        Installation of textproc/intltool (intltool-0.41.1)
        Upgrade of shared-mime-info-1.0_2 to shared-mime-info-1.0_3

fbsd#

Worked for me.
Thanks.
